raw_title: Twitch’s Digital News Standard: Breaking Journalistic Boundaries in Platform Streaming Environments
title_en: Twitch’s Digital News Standard: Breaking Journalistic Boundaries in Platform Streaming Environments
title_zh: Twitch的数字新闻标准：在平台流媒体环境中打破新闻界限
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了Twitch平台如何通过其直播流媒体环境重新定义数字新闻的标准和实践。它分析了Twitch如何打破传统新闻的界限，为新闻传播创造了新的可能性。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how the Twitch platform redefines digital news standards and practices through its live streaming environment. It analyzes how Twitch breaks traditional journalistic boundaries, creating new possibilities for news dissemination.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字媒体平台（如Twitch）如何影响新闻业的演变，特别是在直播流媒体环境中新闻生产、传播和消费方式的变革。
research_direction_en: Investigating how digital media platforms (like Twitch) influence the evolution of journalism, particularly in the transformation of news production, dissemination, and consumption in live streaming environments.
